en: Did you say she was a chick by any chance?
ko: 혹시 여자라고 했어?

en: Uh, hi.
ko: 어, 안녕.

en: Well, well, ladies, I can explain.
ko: 저기, 아가씨들, 설명할 수 있어.

en: See, um, I'm a princess too. Wait, what?
ko: 나도 공주거든. 잠깐, 뭐?

en: Yeah, Princess Vanellope von Schweetz, of the Sugar Rush von Schweetzes.
ko: 응, 프린세스 바넬로피 폰 슈위츠, 슈거 러시의 폰 슈위츠 가문이야.

en: I'm sure you've heard of us. It'd be embarrassing for you if you haven't.
ko: 들어봤을 거야. 안 들어봤으면 좀 창피한 거야.

en: What kind of a princess are you? What kind?
ko: 어떤 종류의 공주야? 어떤 종류?

en: Do you have magic hair? No. Magic hands? No.
ko: 마법 머리카락 있어? 아니. 마법 손? 아니.

en: Do animals talk to you? No. Were you poisoned? No.
ko: 동물이 말해? 아니. 독을 먹은 적 있어? 아니.

en: No. Kidnapped or enslaved? No. Are you guys okay? Should I call the police?
ko: 아니. 납치당하거나 노예가 된 적 있어? 아니. 너희 괜찮아? 경찰 불러야 해?

en: Then I have to assume you made a deal with an underwater sea witch where she took your voice in exchange
ko: 그럼 바닷속 마녀랑 거래해서 목소리 대신 인간 다리를 받은 거야?

en: for a pair of human legs? No. Good lord, who would do that?
ko: 아니. 세상에, 누가 그런 걸 해?

en: Have you ever had true love's kiss? Ew, barf!
ko: 진정한 사랑의 키스를 받은 적 있어? 으, 역겨워!

en: Do you have daddy issues? I don't even have a mom. Neither do we!
ko: 아빠 문제 있어? 엄마도 없는데. 우리도!

en: And now for the million dollar question.
ko: 백만 달러짜리 질문.

en: Do people assume all your problems got solved because a big strong man showed up?
ko: 큰 힘센 남자가 나타나서 네 문제가 다 해결됐다고 생각하는 사람들이 있어?

en: Yes! What is up with that? She is a princess!
ko: 맞아! 그게 대체 뭐야? 걔 공주 맞아!

en: Who made your gown? I've never seen anything quite like it.
ko: 누가 드레스 만들었어? 이런 건 처음 봐.

en: Oh, this old thing? Oh, I'd so love to have one of my own. As would I.
ko: 이거? 나도 하나 갖고 싶다. 나도.

en: Me too. Best outfit ever. I want one too, you guys.
ko: 나도. 나도. 최고의 옷이야. 나도 갖고 싶어.

en: I'll get my mice on this. Ah!
ko: 내 쥐들한테 시킬게. 아!

en: So this is love. All hail Princess Penelope,
ko: 이것이 바로 사랑. 만세 페넬로피 공주,

en: the Queen of Comfy. Hey, Penelope!
ko: 편안함의 여왕. 야, 페넬로피!

en: Of all the thingamabobs in this entire world, I never thought I'd get to wear a real...
ko: 세상의 모든 이것저것 중에서 진짜 이걸 입을 줄이야...

en: what's it called again? Oh, yeah. Shirt.
ko: 뭐라고 했지? 아, 맞다. 셔츠.

en: I once had a dream that I might wear a shirt.
ko: 언젠가 셔츠를 입는 꿈을 꿨어.

en: Whoa, whoa, whoa. Wait, what's going on?
ko: 와, 잠깐. 무슨 일이야?

en: Uh, she's singing? Yeah, but there was, like, music in the spotlight and...
ko: 노래하는 거야? 그래, 근데 음악이랑 스포트라이트가...

en: Wait, you all saw it too, right? That's what happens when a princess sings about her dreams.
ko: 잠깐, 너희도 봤지? 공주가 꿈을 노래하면 그렇게 돼.

en: Oh, that's never happened to me. I mean, not even once.
ko: 아, 나한테는 한 번도 안 일어났는데. 한 번도.

en: Why don't you give it a try? What is it you really want?
ko: 한번 해봐. 진짜 원하는 게 뭐야?

en: Sing about that. Okay. Uh, sure. Oh, I can do that.
ko: 노래해봐. 좋아. 음. 할 수 있어.

en: Um, let's see. Ahem. Oh, steering wheel!
ko: 음, 보자. 에헴. 핸들!

en: Oh, steering wheel! Oh, yes, I want a steering wheel!
ko: 핸들! 아, 핸들이 갖고 싶어!

en: Do-do-do-boop-wop. Well, there's a lot to unpack here.
ko: 두두두붑왑. 음, 풀어야 할 게 많네.

en: So this steering wheel you sing of, that's a metaphor?
ko: 그 핸들은 은유야?

en: Oh, no, no, no, it's not a metaphor.
ko: 아 아니, 은유가 아니야.

en: I just, I literally want a steering wheel.
ko: 그냥, 진짜 핸들이 갖고 싶어.

en: I think the issue was I was a little pitchy. Maybe a little.
ko: 음정이 좀 불안정했나 봐. 조금.

en: But sometimes your song can't start until you go someplace to reflect.
ko: 근데 가끔 노래는 반성할 장소에 가야 시작돼.

en: What works for some of us is finding a form of water and staring at it.
ko: 우리 중 일부는 물을 찾아서 쳐다보면 돼.

en: What? Oh, yes, I like to stare at a wishing well.
ko: 뭐? 아, 맞아, 난 소원의 우물을 쳐다봐.

en: I stare at the ocean. Horace Trough. Soap bubbles.
ko: 난 바다를 쳐다봐. 말 여물통. 비눗방울.

en: Wait, you're saying if I just stare at some water...
ko: 잠깐, 물을 쳐다보면...

en: Da, important water. Right, of course, important water.
ko: 그래, 중요한 물이야. 맞아, 당연히 중요한 물.

en: I stare at the important water and somehow magically I'll start singing about my dream?
ko: 중요한 물을 쳐다보면 마법처럼 꿈에 대해 노래하게 돼?

en: For sure. Uh, yeah, I don't think so, ladies, but thanks.
ko: 당연하지. 응, 아가씨들, 고맙지만 안 될 것 같아.

en: Five minutes, princesses. Another Which Disney Princess Are You?
ko: 5분이요, 공주님들. 또 디즈니 공주 퀴즈가

en: quiz that starts in five minutes. Thank you.
ko: 5분 후에 시작돼요. 감사합니다.

en: Well, I guess it's back to the gowns, girls.
ko: 자, 드레스로 돌아가야겠다, 얘들아.

en: It was lovely to meet you, Vanellope.
ko: 만나서 반가웠어, 바넬로피.

en: And best of luck finding your song.
ko: 네 노래 찾길 바라.

en: Blimey, you're lumbery giving me a moose nail. You're giving away a teardrop in his eye.
ko: 어쩌고저쩌고 무스 손톱이 어쩌고. 눈물이 어쩌고.

en: He should bite me, lassie. Uh-huh.
ko: 어쩌고저쩌고 아가씨. 응.

en: What did she just say? We don't know. We can't understand her.
ko: 뭐라고 한 거야? 몰라. 못 알아듣겠어.

en: She's from the other studio.
ko: 다른 스튜디오 출신이거든.
